name: kanbantic-claude-plugin
description: Kanbantic issue lifecycle skills: intake (report / request / propose), triage, prepare, execute, review — all artifacts via Kanbantic MCP. v2.5.1 narrows /kanbantic-sync-workspace-skills materialization to Skill+Subagent only (KBT-B250 / KBT-BD086): Command toolkit-items are reference-only snippets and intentionally stay Toolkit-only — v2.5.0 silently exposed them as slash-commands under .claude/commands/, polluting the namespace. v2.5.0 adds /kanbantic-sync-workspace-skills (KBT-F265 / KBT-TRUL014): materializes the active workspace's Toolkit Skill / Subagent items as on-disk `.claude/commands/*.md` and `.claude/agents/*.md` mirrors with a `.kanbantic-sync.json` manifest for drift detection. Companion to Kanbantic API change KBT-F264 (bootstrap_agent now also returns skills/commands/subagents/customs arrays). v2.4.2 patches lane-skill SKILL.md mechanical inconsistencies (KBT-B192 / KBT-RL064). v2.4.1 adds a real-proxy regression test + bundle ↔ live MCP-registry drift detector (KBT-B200). v2.4.0 introduces Phase-of-Features-of-Tasks Epic shape (KBT-F250). v2.3.0 introduced InDeployment (KBT-F236), v2.2.0 introduced Prepared (KBT-F235). See RELEASE_NOTES_v2.5.1.md.
